lib-1.title: Constitution of Pakistan 1973
lib-1.description: The supreme law of Pakistan, outlining fundamental rights, governance structure, and distribution of powers.

lib-2.title: Pakistan Penal Code 1860
lib-2.description: The main criminal code governing offences and punishments in Pakistan.

lib-3.title: Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961
lib-3.description: Governs marriage, divorce, and family matters for Muslims in Pakistan.

lib-4.title: Transfer of Property Act 1882
lib-4.description: Defines the rules for the transfer of property between parties in Pakistan.

lib-5.title: Industrial Relations Act 2012
lib-5.description: Regulates collective bargaining, trade unions, and industrial disputes.

lib-6.title: Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act 2016 (PECA)
lib-6.description: Pakistan's cybercrime law covering online offences, digital fraud, and hate speech.
